# BP-140 negative: sqlx.Get returns and checks its error.
lang: go
file: BP-140-safe.go
variant: sqlx-get-checked
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type User struct{}

func loadUser(db *sqlx.DB, user *User) error {
	if err := db.Get(user, "SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = ?", 1); err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("get user: %w", err)
	}
	return nil
}
